probe_packet_policy: This packet is an operator checklist for external 0x00 runtime harness evidence; it does not run a real harness.
Generated traces, results, SPCs, WAVs, and evidence markdown must stay under ignored build/audio paths.
Dry-run and stub-shape commands prove runner/result schema only; they do not resolve zero-runtime semantics.
Every job must observe the same ten reader PCs so EF-return and true-end classifications are comparable.
Validated zero-effect results route to active-preview, finite/transition, or loop-point follow-up before public exact export changes.
This packet cannot directly promote sequence commands, public exact durations, or release-quality playback claims.

records.promotion_question: Does 0x00 end the active phrase, or does EF context make it a return for this track?
success_criteria: capture at least one 0x00 sequence read for this track or explain why the source state cannot reach it
classify post-0x00 behavior as true_end, ef_return, loop_or_hold_continues, or unresolved
record EF call depth/return target before and after the observed 0x00 read
leave public exact-duration promotion blocked unless a later result validator consumes this evidence
